---
#title: "about"
listing:
  contents: about
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  table-striped: true
  table-hover: true
  fields: [image, title, course-format]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: 
    categories: [R, Quarto]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
#knitr:
#  opts_chunk: 
#    collapse: true
execute: 
  echo: false
---

![](images/logo.png){.profile-pic fig-alt="logo, a simple graph resembling Edinburgh skyline" fig-align="center" width="33%"}

Here you will find some useful information about the team

TODO, some description with links to [about](about.qmd),  [people](people.qmd),  [resources](resources.qmd),  [teaching](teaching.qmd)

TODO: interesting way to include link? in R:

`r icon_link(
  icon = "globe",
  text = "website",
  url = "https://www.pairprogramming.ed.ac.uk"
)`

# [ABOUT]{.second-color}
Get to know our DDI Talent team and the different teaching activities.
